name: mr-watchdog
description: Triggered by an open merge request, a detached background watchdog monitors the MR's remote CI and drives it to green — on a red pipeline it fetches the failing job log, spawns a headless agent to fix the ROOT CAUSE (never a bypass: no skipped/deleted tests, no --no-verify, no || true, no lowered thresholds), commits the fix on the branch to re-trigger CI, and loops until green or a bounded attempt cap. Never merges, never touches the default branch, never force-pushes. Opt-in per repo. Forge-agnostic (GitHub via gh, GitLab via glab).
